title: OSU graduation — degree-requirements audit, Dec 2024
html:
TL;DR

  • Audit of what Yahir needs to graduate Oregon State CS, written 4 days before he flies out of China in Dec 2024.
  • Need 9 CS electives + MTH 251, MTH 252, public speaking, western cultures, Intro to Security somehow to fit in.
  • Winter 2025 plan: ECON 399, Open Source Software, CS Elective, CS 462 Capstone.
  • Spring 2025 plan: Intro to Security, CS 493 Capstone, CS 499 Intelligent Design, CS Elective.
  • Two capstones in two terms — abnormally heavy load alongside the Brotein grind that follows in Spring 2025.

Key fact

"Winter: ECON 399, Open Source Software, CS Elective, CS 462 Capstone. Spring: Intro to Security, CS 493 capstone, CS 499 intelligent design, CS Elective."

Why it matters in the graph

  • Confirms the graduation timeline: Yahir graduated Spring 2025 (referenced in 2024 07 04 questions mega notebook "RSVP for graduation", 2025 04 20 people i am indebted to).
  • The two-capstone Spring is the same term as the Sam restraining-order events in 2025 04 25 restraining order lawyer and the Brotein launch grind in 2025 05 30 todos — heavy concurrent load explains the gym-job-as-bridge-income decision later.
  • Open Source Software, Intelligent Design, Capstones form the CS-academic frame during the same months Yahir is shipping consumer apps — useful for the OSU entity page's "what he actually studied" section.

Open questions

  • Did all of these classes get completed? Final transcript verifiable.
  • Was Brotein the capstone project officially?
